store_info.description_short: Plan your projects with the elegance of a sloth on a sunny day.
description_long: Vikunja is an open-source, self-hosted to-do and project-management app. Tasks support priorities, due dates, reminders, labels, attachments, sub-tasks and saved filters, viewable as list, kanban, gantt, table or calendar.

Projects nest into hierarchies and can be shared with teams. Authentication is built-in (username/password) with optional OpenID Connect. A single Go binary bundles the Vue frontend and runs on SQLite by default — no separate database required.
